import{useRef,useState,useEffect}from'react';/**
 * Returns [ref, isVisible].
 * Once the element enters the viewport it stays visible (disconnect after first trigger).
 */export default function useInView(){let threshold=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0.12;const ref=useRef(null);const[visible,setVisible]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const obs=new IntersectionObserver(_ref=>{let[entry]=_ref;if(entry.isIntersecting){setVisible(true);obs.disconnect();}},{threshold});if(ref.current)obs.observe(ref.current);return()=>obs.disconnect();},[threshold]);return[ref,visible];}
